{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = King (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The King is an entity that must not meet the Killer.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The King is prophesied to rise from the ashes of the Killer.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
